channel.title: Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board - Public Notices
channel.description: Public notices for Kissimmee Planning Advisory Board meetings and proceedings

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15880-JG Mowing and Landscaping Services for Small Machine ...
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) RFP-26-15880-JG Mowing and Landscaping Services for Small Machine Area II. There will be no Pre-Proposal Conference for this project. Deadline for Questions: Tuesday, May 19, 2026, at 12:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, June 2, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Jovany Galarza - (407) 742-0943. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org [http://vendorlink.osceola.org]. May 7, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) ITB-26-15488-DG - Osceola County Board of County Commissioners is se...
Meeting: Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 10:00 AM
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) ITB-26-15488-DG - Osceola County Board of County Commissioners is seeking bids from Florida Department of Transportation (FDOT) pre-qualified contractors to provide Construction Services for Carroll Street from West of Lehigh Avenue to East of Sample Street Project (FPN: 433204-2-58-01). The Carroll Street Improvements project is designed to improve traffic operations and safety of approximately 1,700 feet (0.33 miles) of the existing Carroll Street from West of Lehigh Avenue to East of Sample Street. The project includes the construction of roadway safety improvements, pedestrian improvements, mast arm signalized intersection, pavement widening, milling and resurfacing, signing and striping, mobilization, maintenance of traffic, drainage improvements, and TOHO utility relocation along Carroll Street. To be considered, the Contractor (Prime) shall be Florida Department of Transportation (FDOT) Prequalified in the following Work Classes: 7. Drainage, 10. Flexible Paving, and 11. Grading. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: https://Vendorlink.osceola.org. There will be a VIRTUAL NON-MANDATORY PRE-BID CONFERENCE on Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 10:00 AM Local Time. Dial in at 407-906-2344, and when prompted, enter the following conference code: 749 319 711#. Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, May 13, 2026 at 12:00 PM Local Time. DUE DATE: Tuesday, May 26, 2026 at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Don Gaskins (407) 742-0931. The broadcast date is April 26, 2026. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. April 30, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15845-GD - Lock- smith Services
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15845-GD - Lock- smith Services. There will be no Pre-Bid Conference for this project: Deadline for Questions: Wednesday, MAY 6, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, May 19, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact Daniel Gutierrez (407) 742-0939. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. April 23, 2026

item.title: Miscellaneous Notices - Kissimmee
item.description:
LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15871-EN - Emergency Generator Preventive Maintenance Inspecti...
Meeting: Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 9:00 AM
--- Full Notice Text --- LEGAL ADVERTISEMENT OSCEOLA COUNTY BOARD OF COUNTY COMMISSIONERS PROJECTS: 1) AR-26-15871-EN - Emergency Generator Preventive Maintenance Inspection and Service. There will be no Pre-Bid Conference for this project: Deadline for Questions: Friday, April 24th, 2026, at 4:00 PM Local Time. Due Date: Tuesday, May 12th, 2026, at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact Evelyn Nunez (407) 742-0935. 2) RFP-26-15262-DG - Osceola County Board of County Commissioners is seeking proposals for Inmate Banking and Commissary Ordering Software, Intake/Kiosk Bail Bond Services, Secure Release Services (Debit Card Program), Inmate Phone Services, Video Visitation System, Commissary Services and Inmate Vending Services for the Inmates at the Osceola County Corrections Facility. The solicitation document and any addenda can be accessed and downloaded from VendorLink at the following web address: Vendorlink.osceola.org. There will be a VIRTUAL NON-MANDATORY PRE-PROPOSAL CONFERENCE held on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, at 10:00 AM Local Time. Dial in at 407-906-2344, and when prompted, enter the following conference code: 727 049 153#.Please note the meeting will be audio recorded. There will be a Non-Mandatory Onsite Visit held on Thursday, April 23, 2026 at 9:00 AM Local Time at the Osceola County Corrections Facility, 402 Simpson Road, Kissimmee, Florida 34744. The deadline for questions is Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 12:00 PM Local Time. DUE DATE: Tuesday, May 19, 2026 at 2:00 PM Local Time. Contact: Don Gaskins (407) 742-0931. The release date for this solicitation is April 12, 2026. FOR MORE INFORMATION, VISIT OSCEOLA COUNTYS VENDORLINK WEB SITE AT http://vendorlink.osceola.org. April 16, 2026
